_doc: Top-20 all-time greats per team across NFL/NBA/MLB/NHL/MLS. Each team's list is ordered loosely by consensus (best first). 'era' is a string year-range or single year. 'jersey_number' is null when the team didn't retire/honor it for that player. 'key_stat' is one signature accomplishment / number. Optional 'highlight_video_id' is a YouTube video id for a career-highlight clip, populated by the daily all-time-greats backfill cron (server/src/jobs/allTimeGreatsHighlights.ts). 5 teams seeded as the schema canary; the rest are queued for batch population (see TODO below).
_todo_batch_plan: NFL (32 teams) — Wikipedia 'List of {team} all-time roster' + Pro Football Reference team Hall of Famers
NBA (30 teams) — Wikipedia 'Career statistical leaders for the {team}' + retired numbers
MLB (30 teams) — Baseball Reference team WAR leaderboards + retired numbers
NHL (32 teams) — Hockey Reference team scoring leaders + Hall of Fame inductees
MLS (29 teams) — Sparser; team Hall of Fame + retired numbers + best-of records (newer franchises may have <20)
